attempts.error_summary: DMD2 model construction allocated about 23.5 GiB on one visible RTX 3090 and failed on an additional allocation.
attempts.name: single_free_gpu

attempts.error_summary: Both ranks filled their 24 GiB visible GPUs while constructing net_teacher; context parallelism did not shard enough during model construction.
attempts.name: two_free_gpus_context_parallel

next_bridge_task: Add a Transfer2.5 inference profile that skips teacher/fake-score construction or offloads those networks before CUDA placement; then rerun on GPU 1 or GPUs 1,2.
root_cause: The official distilled Transfer2.5 DMD2 inference path builds student, teacher, and fake-score networks before generation. Tiny 9-frame/1-step input does not reduce model-construction memory.
